description: Command R+ chat, multilingual embeddings, and best-in-class rerank for RAG pipelines.

chat.notes: Command R / Command R+ chat with tool use and multi-turn. Pass `model` (command-r-plus, command-r). Supports connectors and structured outputs.

rerank.notes: The killer endpoint for RAG: pass a query and N candidate documents (search results), get them re-ordered by semantic relevance with scores. Use after search_web/exa_search to keep top 3-5. Multilingual (rerank-v3.5).

embed.notes: Multilingual embeddings (embed-multilingual-v3, 1024-dim). Strong on PT/ES/FR/DE — better than English-first models for non-English content.
